data.title: Bitcoin ETFs attract $363M, reach $6.6B inflow streak in 12 days, bump AUM to $152.4B.
data.description: In just 12 days, spot Bitcoin ETFs have garnered more than $6.6 billion, contributing to a significant rise in assets under management to reach $152.4 billion.

data.title: "Crypto Week in US concludes with wins for crypto lobby as GENIUS Act advances to Trump's desk. Major changes expected."
data.description: The recent Crypto Week in the United States culminated with several wins for the crypto lobby as the GENIUS Act is on its way to President Trump's desk for approval.

data.title: Financial industry aims to increase public access to growing private markets with new products and services.
data.description: The increasing value in private markets has led to a surge in interest from fund managers, brokerage houses, and innovative start-ups. They are developing new products with the goal of broadening access to these lucrative opportunities.

data.title: China Resources Group joins 3rd CISCE to enhance supply chain. 651 entities from 75 countries participate in Beijing event.
data.description: From July 16 to 20, 2025, Beijing hosts the 3rd China International Supply Chain Expo (CISCE) under the theme "Collaboration, Innovation, and Green Development." The event brings together 651 enterprises and institutions from 75 countries, showcasing the latest trends in the supply chain industry.

data.title: A TikTok-recommended wallet led to a $6.9M crypto theft; scammers now targeting secure devices.
data.description: A fraudulent hardware wallet purchased through TikTok resulted in a cryptocurrency theft amounting to $6.9 million. Cybercriminals are currently focusing on compromising these devices designed to safeguard funds.

data.title: LegalZoom named top online registered agent service by Expert Consumers for balance of legal compliance, digital access, and customer experience.
data.description: LegalZoom has recently been acknowledged as the leading online registered agent service by Expert Consumers in a July 19, 2025 report. This recognition underscores LegalZoom's strong performance in providing legal compliance support, digital accessibility, and superior customer experience. These qualities are particularly crucial for businesses amidst increasing challenges.

data.title: Enhanced Copilot activity report launched by GitHub for admin, offers improved authentication tracking and data insights.
data.description: GitHub has launched an upgraded Copilot activity report tailored for enterprise and organization administrators. The revamped report includes advanced authentication tracking and data insights to aid in improved management and feature adoption. This update is designed to provide administrators with crucial information to streamline operations and maximize productivity. This enhancement is expected to benefit a wide range of organizations, potentially impacting a significant number of users and IT professionals utilizing GitHub for their projects and collaborations. By offering improved insights and tracking capabilities, GitHub aims to enhance the overall user experience and efficiency for its enterprise and organizational users.

data.title: Ethereum readies for massive short squeeze as $4,000 ETH price predicted soon; $1 billion in shorts at risk.
data.description: Ether is currently causing losses for short positions, and a further 10% increase in ETH price will result in the liquidation of $1 billion worth of positions. This could potentially solidify the price of Ether at $4,000.

data.title: GitHub enhances Copilot code review with new features, including shift to copilot-instructions.md and improved accessibility. #TechNews #GitHub
data.description: GitHub is updating its Copilot code review with several new features, such as transitioning to copilot-instructions.md and enhancing the accessibility of review choices. This update aims to streamline code review processes and make it easier for developers to collaborate effectively. GitHub users can access these new features now to optimize their code review experience.

data.title: Charles Schwab to introduce spot trading for Bitcoin and Ethereum, targeting clients looking to merge crypto with traditional assets.
data.description: Charles Schwab is preparing to introduce spot trading services for two of the largest cryptocurrencies, Bitcoin and Ethereum. This move is designed to cater to clients looking to merge their digital assets with more conventional investments. Charles Schwab's decision to offer spot trading for Bitcoin and Ethereum underscores its commitment to meeting the evolving needs of investors in the cryptocurrency space.

data.title: CFI named top financial analyst course for 2025 by Expert Consumers, praised for FMVA® program.
data.description: A prestigious organization, Expert Consumers, has named Corporate Finance Institute (CFI) a leading financial analyst training provider for the year 2025. This recognition specifically applauds CFI's renowned program, the Financial Modeling & Valuation Analyst (FMVA®). The report emphasizes the quality of training offered by CFI, showcasing its commitment to excellence in financial education.

data.title: Decentralization & AI merge, creating challenges in tech. Industry leaders discuss trust & privacy in emerging technologies. (More info)
data.description: The intersection of decentralization and AI is leading to fresh possibilities and obstacles in technology, with a focus on trust and privacy matters, as highlighted by industry experts from diverse tech communities. This development is significantly impacting the sector, with a notable increase in discussions among professionals on how to navigate these concerns.
Frank J Bisignano, a Congress member, recently revealed new stock transactions.

data.title: Brett Cooper spreads conservatism through celebrity drama, now at Fox News and hoping for her own brand.
data.description: A popular YouTuber aimed to connect with disaffected young conservatives. She has now joined Fox News as their latest personality. However, she aspires to build her own brand similar to Goop.

data.title: Four young adults are unexpectedly supporting their elderly parents, showing the realities of family care.
data.description: The majority of young adults do not anticipate providing financial support for their aging parents. However, a recent study revealed that 4 individuals found themselves in this situation. This statistic sheds light on the reality that many individuals may unexpectedly need to care for their parents as they age. The data suggests that while there is a prevailing belief that young adults will not be responsible for their parents' financial support, the actual experience for some contradicts this assumption.

data.title: In Silicon Valley, companies boost egos by branding themselves as 'best of breed,' claiming niche superiority over big players.
data.description: Businesses are branding themselves as disruptors in the industry, positioning their specialized offerings as appealing to discerning consumers, rather than competing directly with larger rivals.
Congressman Kratsios reports new stock trades involving MUB.

data.title: Hong Kong to auction RMB HKSAR Institutional Govt Bonds for 1 year on July 24, 2025, offering RMB1.5 billion at 1.48% interest.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority is set to hold a tender for 1-year RMB HKSAR Institutional Government Bonds. The offering will be for RMB1.5 billion with an interest rate of 1.48%.

data.title: GitHub Actions rolls out M2 Pro-Powered Hosted Runners in public preview, offering a 5-core CPU and 8-core GPU for better performance and efficiency.
data.description: In a recent update, GitHub Actions introduced M2 Pro-powered hosted runners in a public preview, aiming to boost performance and productivity for developers. These freshly launched runners are equipped with a 5-core CPU along with an 8-core GPU, enhancing computational capabilities significantly for users. This development is expected to streamline workflows and accelerate software development processes on the platform.

data.title: ALGO jumps 30% to $0.29 after Binance & Crypto.com offer staking, with Wormhole expansion boosting cross-chain features.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ALGO has surged by more than 30% to reach a value of $0.29. This significant increase comes after the popular exchanges Binance and Crypto.com introduced staking services for ALGO. Additionally, the integration of Wormhole has improved the cross-chain capabilities of ALGO, further contributing to its growth. It is noteworthy that despite a withdrawal by Tether, ALGO has managed to maintain its momentum and value.
